name: soundcue
description: Codex plugin prototype for transcript-first audio notes, suggested edits, and linear audio version review.

interface.shortDescription: Mark audio like a document and ask Codex to generate suggested edits.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight audio review panel for one Codex conversation per project. It keeps transcript notes, suggested edits, and linear v1/v2/v3 audio versions in local project files.
defaultPrompt: Open the SoundCue project for this conversation
Create a suggested edit for the current audio note
Show the current audio project folder
